---
toc: false
---

---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: block1
  image: images/profile_test.jpg
  links:
   - icon: linkedin
     href: https://ch.linkedin.com/in/sabina-pedrazzini-543051169
   - icon: envelope
     href: "mailto:sabina.pedrazzini@unibe.ch"
---

::: {#block1}
:::

<!-- note: to create the block above (which "calls" the yaml block): 1) go on "Source" mode 2) :::{#bock1}:::-->

# Sabina Pedrazzini

I'm a PhD candidate at the [Centre for Development and Environment](https://www.cde.unibe.ch/) of the University of Bern (Switzerland). My research focuses on the determinants of collective action in urban commons initiatives, and on its consequences for individual psychological well-being.
